execution_id.description: Agent action execution identifier returned by agent.action.run or visible in execution history.

include_output.description: When false, stdout and stderr payloads are omitted even if stored. Defaults to true.

stdout_offset.description: UTF-8 byte offset into stored redacted stdout for this response window.

stderr_offset.description: UTF-8 byte offset into stored redacted stderr for this response window.

max_output_bytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 bytes to return per stream (stdout and stderr each). Defaults to 65536 when omitted.

trace_id.description: Optional distributed trace id for remote audit correlation on read-only polling.

requested_by.description: Optional hub requester identity for remote audit correlation on read-only polling.

client_token.description: Opaque token or JWT for authorization when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active. Aliases: clientToken, auth
